title: SNP, Scotland’s Pro-Independence Party, Benefits From Labour’s Struggles With Voters
summary_full: The unpopularity of Keir Starmer’s party since he became Britain’s prime minister has helped boost the Scottish National Party.
summary_public: The unpopularity of Keir Starmer’s party since he became Britain’s prime minister has helped boost the Scottish National Party.

GB.label: neutral
GB.evidence: Britain’s prime minister has helped boost the Scottish National Party
